name: Pasta with Quick Tomato and Garlic Sauce
recipeIngredient: Egg Pasta (or 3/4 Lb fettuccine or tagliatelle)
recipeInstructions:
1. Salt and pepper to taste (optional Parmesan cheese, grated)
2. Prepare the egg pasta by rolling the dough as thin as possible and cutting into 1/8- to 1/4-inch wide strips.
3. Peel, seed, and chop the tomatoes.
4. Mince the garlic.
5. Heat the olive oil over low heat in a saucepan.
6. Add the minced garlic and cook over medium heat for about 3 minutes until soft.
7. Add the chopped tomatoes to the saucepan and raise the heat to high. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the tomatoes release some of their juice.
8. In a large pot of boiling salted water, cook the pasta until tender (about 3 minutes for fresh pasta). Drain and return the pasta to the pot.
9. Add the tomato sauce and chopped parsley and basil to the pot with the pasta. Toss over low heat until the pasta is lightly coated with the sauce and warmed through.
10. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Serve immediately, garnished with Parmesan cheese if desired.
Makes 4 servings
